(노트) 애니메이션

Nov 15, 2021 • 신록예찬 • 1 min read

시각화 

import numpy as np 
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt 
from matplotlib import animation
plt.rcParams["animation.html"] = "jshtml"

- 모티브

x=np.linspace(0,6.48,30)
y=np.sin(x)

plt.plot(x,y)
plt.plot(x[0],y[0],'.r')

[<matplotlib.lines.Line2D at 0x7fc76c1f7490>]
plt.plot(x,y)
plt.plot(x[0],y[0],'.r')
plt.plot(x[1],y[1],'.r')

[<matplotlib.lines.Line2D at 0x7fc76c274eb0>]
plt.plot(x,y)
plt.plot(x[0],y[0],'.r')
plt.plot(x[1],y[1],'.r')
plt.plot(x[2],y[2],'.r')

[<matplotlib.lines.Line2D at 0x7fc76c1acd00>]

- 예제1

def f(i):
    ax.clear()
    ax.plot(x,y)
    ax.plot(x[:i],y[:i],'.r')

fig,ax  = plt.subplots()
ani = animation.FuncAnimation(fig,f,frames=29) 
plt.close()
ani
</input>

- 예제2

def f(i):
    ax.clear()
    ax.plot(x,y)
    ax.plot(x[i],y[i],'.r')

fig,ax  = plt.subplots()
ani = animation.FuncAnimation(fig,f,frames=30) 
plt.close()
ani
</input>

- 예제3

fig, ax =  plt.subplots()
plt.plot(x,y)
ims = [ax.plot(x[:i],y[:i],'.r') for i in range(30)]
ani = animation.ArtistAnimation(fig, ims)
plt.close()
ani
</input>

- 예제4

fig, ax =  plt.subplots()
plt.plot(x,y)
ims = [ax.plot(x[i],y[i],'.r') for i in range(30)]
ani = animation.ArtistAnimation(fig, ims)
plt.close()
ani
</input>
